See [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) for full agent guidance.

Short instructions for Copilot-style agents
- Focus work on the exercise described in [references/paper.md](../references/paper.md).
- Do not commit secrets from `.env`, `.env.local`, or other environment files.
- Follow the setup notes in [README.md](../README.md) for Supabase env vars.
- Before major re-scaffolding, ask the user which frontend stack and package manager they prefer.
